## [00:00 - 00:31]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. Hey Rosie O'Donnell's in the news, she's getting engaged. I was putting my little puffy in today and when I heard the news I'm like, oh Rosie's getting engaged? I guess I can put it away. This is what I think about Rosie getting engaged. Get back to work.
